config.title: Realizacja wg receptury #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#include "50200" 'view_message #include "50516"
'-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' getZuzycieParams(WOLANE Z ZEWNATRZ) ' ' Funkcja otwiera dialog do pobrania parametrów dla funkcji ' Create_ZuzycieIdealne ' ' pZUIDPA - parametry '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- dim g_pZUIDPA : set g_pZUIDPA = nothing function getZuzycieParams(byref pZUIDPA) set g_pZUIDPA = pZUIDPA getZuzycieParams = page_.domodalauto() end function
'-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Wybór ilość '--------------------------------------------------------------------------
QVE_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_QUANTITY(CTRLID_WYROB_ILOSC, g_pZUIDPA.m_curIlosc, g_pZUIDPA.opakowanie , pJednOpak, 1)
'-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Wybór recepty '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- function choose_recepta(byref pHli)
dim strWhere: strWhere = ""
dim idRecepta idRecepta = fire_choice_list_disable_add(TYPEID_N5RECEPTA, "Wybierz recepturę", "", strWhere, "", "")
if (idRecepta > 0) then dim pNewRecepta : set pNewRecepta = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5RECEPTA, idRecepta) if not pNewRecepta is g_pZUIDPA.m_pRecepta then set g_pZUIDPA.m_pRecepta = pNewRecepta set g_pZUIDPA.m_pWyrobLubSurowiec = nothing end if
c##CTRLID_WYROB_ILOSC##_ongetdata page_.ctrl(CTRLID_WYROB_ILOSC) end if end function
function choose_wyrsur(byref pHli)
dim strWhere: strWhere = "" dim strPrompt: strPrompt = ""
select case g_pZUIDPA.m_eMode case 2 strWhere = "n5produkt.idobj in (select c_pprodukt from vlist_n5recepta_listWyrob where p_idobj=" + cstr(g_pZUIDPA.m_pRecepta.idobj) + ")" strPrompt = "Wybierz wyrób" case 3 strWhere = "n5produkt.idobj in (select c_pprodukt from vlist_n5recepta_listSurowce where p_idobj=" + cstr(g_pZUIDPA.m_pRecepta.idobj) + ")" strPrompt = "Wybierz surowiec" end select
dim idChoice idChoice = fire_choice_list_disable_add(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT, strPrompt, "", strWhere, "", "")
if (idChoice > 0) then set g_pZUIDPA.m_pWyrobLubSurowiec = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT, idChoice) end if end function
function c##CTRLID_RECEPTA_NAZWA##_ongetdata(pCtrl) if (g_pZUIDPA.m_pRecepta is nothing) then pCtrl.value = "<wybierz recepturę>" else pCtrl.value = g_pZUIDPA.m_pRecepta.text end if page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ROW_WYR_SUR).hide = (g_pZUIDPA.m_eMode = 1) or (g_pZUIDPA.m_pRecepta is nothing) page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ROW_RULE).hide = (g_pZUIDPA.m_pRecepta is nothing)
c##CTRLID_RECEPTA_NAZWA##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_RECEPTA_NAZWA##_ondataentered(pCtrl, strValue) if (strValue = "") then set g_pZUIDPA.m_pRecepta = nothing end if
c##CTRLID_RECEPTA_NAZWA##_ondataentered = true end function
function c##CTRLID_RADIO_MODE##_ongetdata(pCtrl) pCtrl.value = g_pZUIDPA.m_eMode c##CTRLID_RADIO_MODE##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_WYR_SUR_LABEL##_ongetdata(pCtrl) select case g_pZUIDPA.m_eMode case 2 pCtrl.value = "Wyrób" case 3 pCtrl.value = "Surowiec" case else pCtrl.value = "" end select
c##CTRLID_WYR_SUR_LABEL##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_WYR_SUR_NAZWA##_ongetdata(pCtrl) if (g_pZUIDPA.m_pWyrobLubSurowiec is nothing) then select case g_pZUIDPA.m_eMode case 2 pCtrl.value = "<wybierz wyrób>" case 3 pCtrl.value = "<wybierz surowiec>" case else pCtrl.value = "" end select else pCtrl.value = g_pZUIDPA.m_pWyrobLubSurowiec.text end if
c##CTRLID_WYR_SUR_NAZWA##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_WYR_SUR_NAZWA##_ondataentered(pCtrl, strValue) if (strValue = "") then set g_pZUIDPA.m_pWyrobLubSurowiec = nothing end if
c##CTRLID_WYR_SUR_NAZWA##_ondataentered = true end function
function c##CTRLID_RADIO_MODE##_ondataentered(pCtrl, strValue) g_pZUIDPA.m_eMode = pCtrl.value select case g_pZUIDPA.m_eMode case 1 set g_pZUIDPA.m_pWyrobLubSurowiec = nothing case 2 if g_pZUIDPA.m_pRecepta.listWyrob.exists(1) then set g_pZUIDPA.m_pWyrobLubSurowiec = g_pZUIDPA.m_pRecepta.listWyrob.get(1).pProdukt else set g_pZUIDPA.m_pWyrobLubSurowiec = nothing end if case 3 if g_pZUIDPA.m_pRecepta.listSurowce.exists(1) then set g_pZUIDPA.m_pWyrobLubSurowiec = g_pZUIDPA.m_pRecepta.listSurowce.get(1).pProdukt else set g_pZUIDPA.m_pWyrobLubSurowiec = nothing end if end select c##CTRLID_RADIO_MODE##_ondataentered = true end function
'-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Wybór recepty '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- function fcancel() page_.goback end function
function ffill()
if (g_pZUIDPA.m_pRecepta is nothing) then view_message 6318, 0 exit function end if
if (g_pZUIDPA.m_curIlosc <= 0) then view_message 6319, 0 exit function end if if g_pZUIDPA.m_eMode <> 1 then if g_pZUIDPA.m_pWyrobLubSurowiec is nothing then trans_.message 0,0,"Należy wskazać produkt" exit function end if end if
page_.result = CLng(CMD_CHOICE) page_.goback end function
'-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' open & close '--------------------------------------------------------------------------
function fopen() page_.result = 0 fopen = true end function

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Receptura, 1)
QXE_EDIT_CUSTOM_DELONLY(CTRLID_RECEPTA_NAZWA, 40) QXE_PICTURE_ACTION(-1, PICTURE_CHOICE_N5RECEPTA, varFunctionHLI="choose_recepta", Wybór receptury)
QXR_SEPARATOR(1)
QXC_LABEL(Zasada wypełniania, 1)
Wykonaj recepturę 'Ilość' razy Wyprodukuj wskazaną ilość wyrobu Zużyj wskazaną ilość surowca
QXE_LABEL_CUSTOM_REQ(CTRLID_WYR_SUR_LABEL,10)
QXE_EDIT_CUSTOM_DELONLY(CTRLID_WYR_SUR_NAZWA, 40) QXE_PICTURE_ACTION(-1, PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRODUKT, varFunctionHLI="choose_wyrsur", Wybór surowca/wyrobu)
QXR_SEPARATOR(1)
QXR_QUANTITY_CUSTOM(Ilość, CTRLID_WYROB_ILOSC, FORM_SPAN)
QXF_END
QXX_BUTTON_PAIR(Wypełnij,,ffill,Anuluj,,fcancel)
